name: Salzer Electronics Limited
summary: Salzer Electronics Limited manufactures and supplies CAM operated rotary switches, selector switches, wiring ducts, voltmeter switches, and allied products primarily in India. The company offers industrial components, including cable ducts, sensors, changeover switches and solar isolators, general purpose relays, load break and photo voltaic switches, limit and foot switches, terminal connectors, customized control panels, and industrial plugs and sockets; and motor control products, such as contactors and overload relays, motor protection circuit breakers, and miniature circuit breakers (MCBs). It also provides transformers, which include inductors, chokes and filters, single phase toroidal transformers, and three phase lamination transformers, as well as toroidal transformers, CT's, and Rogowski coils; wires and cables comprising industrial wires and cables, wire harnesses, and power cords; and automatic source changeovers with current limiters, distribution boards, modular switches and specialty products, movement sensors, remote switches, single phase motor starters, and house wires. In addition, the company offers bunched copper conductors, PVC insulated copper wires and cables, enameled copper wires, flexible bus bars, lan cables, and tinned copper wires; and energy savers and panels, and street light controllers. Salzer Electronics Limited also exports its products to approximately 40 countries. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Coimbatore, India.
